title: Novartis India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Novartis India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Novartis India has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Pune office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Novartis India:
Novartis India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Novartis India!
